description: CompositionBlack and grey hooded jacket made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has full sleeves in white with patented adidas 3-Stripes running from the shoulder to the cuffs, full front zipper, ribbed cuffs and hem, and printed branding on the left chestFittingComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsPerfect for your sporting needs, this jacket from adidas is designed to keep you warm and comfortable during your training sessions in the winter chill.
